# Track input atoms

**Data field**

A list of track input atoms specifying how to use the input data.

## Overview

The input map defines all of the track’s secondary inputs. Each secondary input is defined using a separate track input atom. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.qtff/documentation/quicktime-file-format/Track_input_atom].

## Data fields

- **Size**: A 32-bit integer that specifies the number of bytes in this track input map atom.
- **Type**: A 32-bit integer that identifies the atom type.
